name: react-component-lens
description: Highlight React Server and Client component usage directly in the editor.

reactComponentLens.enabled.description: Enable React Component Lens decorations in React editors.

reactComponentLens.debounceMs.description: Debounce delay, in milliseconds, before recomputing decorations after workspace changes.

reactComponentLens.scope.declaration.description: Highlight component declaration names (function, class, variable).

reactComponentLens.scope.export.description: Highlight component names in export declarations (export { Component }, export default Component).

reactComponentLens.scope.import.description: Highlight component names in import declarations (import { Component } from ...).

reactComponentLens.scope.type.description: Highlight TypeScript interface and type alias declaration names.

reactComponentLens.codelens.enabled.description: Show CodeLens annotations indicating Server/Client Component kind.

reactComponentLens.highlightColors.description: Text colors for React Component Lens decorations.

clientComponent.description: CSS text color used for Client Component usages.

serverComponent.description: CSS text color used for Server Component usages.

scripts.build: bun build ./src/extension.ts --outdir ./out --format cjs --target node --external vscode --external ./core_wasm.js --sourcemap=linked && bun run copy:wasm
scripts.build:production: bun build ./src/extension.ts --outdir ./out --format cjs --target node --external vscode --external ./core_wasm.js --minify && bun run copy:wasm
scripts.watch: bun run copy:wasm && bun build ./src/extension.ts --outdir ./out --format cjs --target node --external vscode --external ./core_wasm.js --sourcemap=linked --watch
